title: pyrus rufa
intro: Pyrus rufa, also known as the Japanese mountain apple or yunnan crabapple, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate diarrhea, and treat respiratory issues due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In traditional Chinese medicine, the fruit of the Pyrus rufa plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, sore throats, and digestive problems, while also providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
